pi_items.source: Task specification (task.json description and metadata) - synthetic test data value for branch creation task
Task specification (task.json description and metadata) - synthetic test data value for branch code
Task specification (task.json description). City verified as real via web search: 94105 is confirmed as San Francisco, CA zip code (https://www.unitedstateszipcodes.org/94105/)

Task specification. Phone number verified as fictional: Area code 415 is San Francisco (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Area_codes_415_and_628). The 555-0100 to 555-0199 range is FCC-designated for fictional use (https://www.nanpa.com/numbering/555-line-numbers). Number 415-555-0198 is within the fictional range.
Task specification (task.json metadata) - SQL wildcard pattern for database query verification of branch name

Web search verified AttendHRM is real product from Lenvica (https://lenvica.com/download-attendhrm/). Installation script (install_attendhrm.ps1 line 12) confirms 'AttendHRM (Lenvica HRMS)'. Installer downloads from https://www.lenvica.com/download/AttendHRM-Attendance-Lite-Setup.exe

Environment setup scripts analyzed: install_attendhrm.ps1 (lines 182-202) verifies Firebird service is bundled and started. setup_attendhrm.ps1 (lines 15-52) waits for Firebird service to be running. Lines 346-420 use Firebird's isql.exe tool with Firebird UPSERT syntax (UPDATE OR INSERT). Database tables WGR_BRA and ITA_POS confirmed as Firebird schema.
setup_attendhrm.ps1 (line 370) explicitly references 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Attend HRM\Data\DEMO.FDB' and loads it via Firebird isql.exe tool. Database extension operations target this file.
setup_attendhrm.ps1 configuration (line 370) and install_attendhrm.ps1 verification section

Task description (not in metadata). Web search found nearby real addresses in 94105 (425 Market Street, 455 Market Street) but no specific confirmation for 450 Market Street itself. Located in San Francisco Financial District area.

privileged_info_summary: The task tests adding a branch named 'Downtown Office' (code 'DTN', city 'San Francisco') to AttendHRM Lite, a real HRMS system by Lenvica. The system operates on a Firebird database (DEMO.FDB) bundled with AttendHRM. All branch data in the task is synthetic: the name, code, city, and phone number (415-555-0198) which is in the official FCC-designated fictional phone number range (555-0100 to 555-0199). The task verifies successful branch creation through database query checking for records matching the pattern '%DOWNTOWN%OFFICE%' and VLM analysis of UI interactions. Area code 415 and zip code 94105 are confirmed as San Francisco. The task runs on a Windows system with Firebird database service and AttendHRM's PyAutoGUI-based UI automation hooks (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1).
